proxy_scope.target_company_context: Aggregate Korean freight (industry-agnostic) — public OD data; not a representation of any single company
proxy_scope.disclaimer: This analysis is generated from public Korean Freight O/D aggregate data and does not represent any individual company or industry. The engine demonstrates the analysis architecture; specifically updated for FMCG and Cold Chain operations.

warnings: Imputed product family based on region heuristic.

notes: Segmentation applied using Group C playbook.
